name: Taskfile Development
description: Installs the Task (go-task) command runner with shell completions and optional alias. Auto-detects Taskfile.yml in the workspace.

version.description: Task version to install, or 'latest' for auto-resolution from GitHub releases

alias.description: Create a 't' alias for 'task' in shell rc files

detectTaskfile.description: Print a hint if Taskfile.yml is found in the workspace
